test_summary: Targeted verification passed with `uv run pytest tests/unit/test_stack_contract.py tests/unit/test_betty_voice_routes.py tests/security/test_privilege_and_redaction.py -q` (`37 passed`). A direct Node check against `app/voice_embed.html` confirmed the browser speech fallback helper cancels prior speech, starts speech synthesis, and restores the idle UI state after completion.
logs: POST https://trustlayer.37-27-94-136.sslip.io/api/betty/voice-chat -> contextual assistant reply for a one-day Rome trip prompt
POST https://trustlayer.37-27-94-136.sslip.io/api/betty/tts -> 500 invalid_api_key from ElevenLabs in the deployed environment
Node executable proof against app/voice_embed.html -> speakWithBrowserTts() called speechSynthesis.cancel(), invoked speechSynthesis.speak(), and transitioned status from speaking to idle
notes: This bundle records the TrustLayer voice-demo path, not the older live settlement demo in tests/manual/evidence-bundle.json.
The deployed ElevenLabs API key was invalid, so the frontend now falls back to native browser speech synthesis for audible TTS.
No live settlement or blockchain receipts are part of this bundle.
